subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-26
subcodes.first_line: The signatory powers of the Hague Convention did not abide by their own agreement. They violated in this last outburst of savagery every article of those carefully drawn, long-debated conventions.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @war and peace, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures
